hero.title: Building a sustainable future together
hero.subtitle: Ciment DAM — Industrial excellence serving Southern Morocco

homeAnchor.title: Regional Anchor
homeAnchor.text: Strategic investment in the Southern Provinces. With a capacity of 100,000 tonnes per year, our Lassargua grinding center is the industrial engine of the Dakhla-Oued Ed-Dahab region.

homeEco.title: DAM ECOShield
homeEco.tagline: The green cement revolutionizing construction in Morocco
homeEco.card1Desc: Thanks to our innovative low-impact grinding process, DAM ECOShield significantly reduces CO₂ emissions compared to traditional cements.
homeEco.card2Desc: Designed for Dakhla's coastal environments, our formulation resists sulfate attacks and marine corrosion.

about.title: About
about.subtitle: Industrial excellence at the heart of Southern Morocco

genesis.title: Genesis
genesis.text: Dakhla Aménagement S.A. is a public limited company founded in 2015 by visionary Mauritanian investors, with the conviction that the Dakhla region needed modern cement infrastructure to support its rapid development.

timeline.t1Text: Creation of Dakhla Aménagement S.A. by visionary Mauritanian investors
timeline.t2Text: Launch of the Lassargua grinding center — 100,000 tonnes/year
timeline.t4Text: Launch of DAM ECOShield and continuous growth ambition

company.title: Dakhla Aménagement
company.text: Dakhla Aménagement S.A. is the industrial engine of the Dakhla-Oued Ed-Dahab region. Our clinker grinding center in Lassargua produces, packages and markets premium construction materials, contributing to the economic and social development of the region.
company.hq: Headquarters: Corner of Lagouira St., El Walae Ave., Dakhla, Morocco

governance.title: Governance
governance.text: Dakhla Aménagement S.A. is led by a Board of Directors composed of experienced professionals, ensuring rigorous and transparent management of the company.

facilities.title: Facilities
facilities.text: Our clinker grinding center is located in Lassargua, near Dakhla. Inaugurated in 2018, it represents an investment of over 200 million MAD and has a production capacity of 100,000 tonnes per year.
facilities.mills: Ball Mills — High-performance mills for fine and consistent grinding
facilities.silos: Storage Silos — High-capacity facilities for clinker and cement
facilities.packaging: Packaging Lines — 50 kg bags and bulk

solutions.title: Solutions & Process
solutions.subtitle: Our cement range and industrial grinding process

cpj35.name: CPJ 35
cpj35.desc: Cement for common masonry, interior and exterior plastering, and bedding mortars. Ideal for residential projects and finishing works.

cpj45.name: CPJ 45
cpj45.desc: Versatile cement for reinforced concrete, floor slabs and common civil engineering works. The benchmark choice for most construction projects.

cpa42_5.name: CPA 42.5
cpa42_5.desc: High-performance cement for demanding structures, precasting and work in aggressive environments. High early strength allows rapid formwork removal.

cpj55.name: CPJ 55
cpj55.desc: High-strength cement for specialized works, deep foundations and civil engineering structures subject to high mechanical stress.

ecoShield.name: DAM ECOShield
ecoShield.desc: Our innovative low-carbon cement, designed for coastal environments. Up to -60% CO₂ emissions compared to traditional cements, with exceptional maritime resistance.

process.title: Grinding Process
process.subtitle: From raw material to finished product, discover each step of our clinker grinding process

step1.title: Clinker Reception
step1.desc: Clinker is received and stored at our Lassargua facility. We ensure rigorous quality control at every delivery, verifying the chemical composition and physical properties of the raw material.

step2.title: Grinding & Dosing
step2.desc: Clinker is finely ground in our high-performance ball mills. Precise dosing of additives (gypsum, limestone, fly ash) guarantees the specific characteristics of each cement type.

step3.title: Quality Control
step3.desc: Each batch undergoes exhaustive testing in our laboratory: compressive strength, fineness, setting time, and heat of hydration. No product leaves the plant without a certificate of conformity.

step4.title: Packaging & Shipping
step4.desc: Cement is packaged in 50 kg bags or shipped in bulk. Our optimized logistics ensure fast and reliable delivery across Southern Morocco and beyond.

quality.title: Quality & Certifications
quality.subtitle: Excellence at the heart of every bag of cement

lab.title: Our Laboratory
lab.text: Our in-house laboratory, equipped with the most advanced technologies, performs chemical and physical analyses at every stage of the manufacturing process. From raw material reception to finished product shipment, no detail is left to chance.

nm.name: NM 10.1.004
nm.desc: Moroccan standard defining specifications for Portland cements

en.name: EN 197-1
en.desc: European standard for composition and specifications of common cements

iso.name: ISO 9001
iso.desc: Quality management system — Certification in progress

sustainability.title: Sustainability
sustainability.subtitle: Building the future while preserving our environment

ecoShield.title: DAM ECOShield
ecoShield.subtitle: The green cement revolutionizing construction in Morocco
ecoShield.desc: DAM ECOShield is our major innovation: a low-carbon cement specifically designed for the coastal environments of Southern Morocco. Thanks to our optimized grinding process and the integration of recycled materials, we reduce CO₂ emissions by 30 to 60% while guaranteeing superior resistance to sulfate attacks and marine corrosion.

environment.title: Environmental Commitments
environment.text: Dakhla Aménagement is committed to minimizing its environmental impact. Our grinding center uses advanced energy efficiency technologies, with an emission filtration system that meets the strictest standards.

social.title: Social Responsibility
social.text: We are proud to contribute to the development of the Dakhla region through local job creation and support for surrounding communities.

economic.title: Economic Impact
economic.text: Dakhla Aménagement actively contributes to the economic development of the Dakhla-Oued Ed-Dahab region through local value creation and support for the regional economy.
economic.jobs: Creation of direct and indirect jobs

medias.title: Media
medias.subtitle: News and press releases from Ciment DAM

article1.title: Dakhla Aménagement surpasses 50,000 tonnes produced in 2024
article1.excerpt: The year 2024 was marked by record production for our grinding center, demonstrating the reliability of our facilities and the commitment of our teams.

article2.title: New partnership for supplying the Dakhla-Oued Ed-Dahab region
article2.excerpt: A strategic agreement was signed to guarantee the supply of quality clinker, strengthening our capacity to meet local demand.

article3.title: ISO 9001 certification program: progress update
article3.excerpt: Our ISO 9001 certification process is progressing according to the planned schedule, demonstrating our quality commitment.

press1.title: Launch of DAM ECOShield: the green cement made in Dakhla
press1.excerpt: Ciment DAM announces the commercial launch of DAM ECOShield, its innovative low-carbon cement, specifically designed for the coastal environments of Southern Morocco.

press2.title: Ciment DAM participates in the International Forum of Dakhla
press2.excerpt: Our company was present at the International Forum of Dakhla, where we presented our vision of sustainable industrial development in the Southern Provinces.

culture.title: Our Culture
culture.text: At Dakhla Aménagement, we value teamwork, technical excellence and commitment. We offer a stimulating work environment where every employee can develop their skills and contribute to concrete projects that shape the future of the region.
